transcript:
CALLER: Hi, do you have a dedicated women's health or well-woman clinic?
AGENT: Yes! We have a Women's Wellness Centre at Sunrise that offers gynaecology consultations, breast and cervical cancer screening, bone density scans, and counselling services — all under one roof.
CALLER: Is there a specific day for the well-woman clinic?
AGENT: The Women's Wellness Centre runs Tuesday and Saturday mornings from 9 AM to 1 PM. Appointments are recommended, though walk-ins are accommodated when slots are available.
CALLER: Can I bring my teenage daughter for screening too?
AGENT: Absolutely. We have a separate adolescent health consultation under the same centre. Please let us know when booking so we can assign the appropriate specialist.
CALLER: Very comprehensive. Thank you so much.
